description: A manually-driven, status-tracked job application pipeline. The human decides to apply, submits externally, and triggers interview prep only after an interview invite. No agent ever submits an application on the human's behalf.

stages.next: run the scout, or build an application directly
the human picks one job to apply to

stages.trigger: manual: the human selected a job
stages.next: the human reviews and approves materials

stages.trigger: manual: the human received an interview invite
stages.next: the human walks into the interview ready

realWorldGates.materials-ready -> applied: The human submits on the company site, then marks applied. No agent submits.
realWorldGates.applied -> interview-invited: The human marks this only when the employer actually invites an interview.

guardrails.privateData: my_private_profile.json and job_search_preferences.json stay git-ignored; never commit personal data.
guardrails.onlyActiveJobs: Job Scout only recommends roles whose official link is verified active (not 404 / closed).
guardrails.noFabrication: No agent invents experience, titles, metrics, or credentials not in the profile or the base resumes.
guardrails.deAiPass: Recommended: run every resume and cover letter through a de-AI (humanizer) pass before showing it, if the humanizer skill is installed.
